summary:
OUT-OF-BODY VISITATION TO OUTER SPACE: Brandon recounts an out-of-body experience from over twenty years ago where he was transported into outer space and stood beside the Lord. From this vantage point, the planets of the solar system, including Saturn, Jupiter, and Mars, appeared scaled down. While standing next to a massive sun, the Lord asked Brandon how long it takes for light to reach the Earth. After Brandon correctly identified the time and the speed of light at 186,000 miles per second, the Lord explained that the speed of thought is much faster. Brandon learned that in the afterlife, believers will not travel at the speed of light but at the speed of thought, allowing for instantaneous movement across vast cosmic distances.

THE CREATION AND MANIPULATION OF THE UNIVERSE: Brandon describes being transported instantly to a boundless, brilliantly white room that served as a separate dimension containing the universe. Inside this dimension, the universe was actively being formed, expanding in all directions simultaneously like slow-moving thunderclouds or cauliflower clouds. Although the creation process was occurring at the speed of light, it appeared slow because the Lord exists outside of time. Brandon observed the universe, which temporarily resembled the shape of a Volkswagen Beetle, continuing to expand and generate stars. The Lord then demonstrated His scale and power by shrinking the universe and holding its billions of galaxies in His hand, shaping it into a cube like clay while the continuous creation of stars remained uninterrupted within His grasp.

HEAVEN AND THE INHERITANCE OF BELIEVERS: Brandon details his vision of Heaven, describing it as a massive planet approximately the size of three Jupiters, situated in its own dimension. Heaven featured pure light, gold, beautiful stones, massive walls, intricate buildings, and a sky filled with swirled pink, purple, and white paisley patterns. The Lord explained to Brandon that while Heaven is His personal portion, the entire universe and all its expanding galaxies are designated as the inheritance for born-again believers. Following a thousand-year reign, these believers will rule over the galaxies and travel between them instantly at the speed of thought.

THE CALL FOR EXPANDED FAITH: Brandon conveys a direct message from the Lord instructing believers to stop thinking small and to recognize the immense scale of God's capabilities. Emphasizing that God can do exceedingly abundantly above what people ask or think, Brandon highlights the endless nature of the universe and its ongoing creation to illustrate God's power. Brandon reiterates biblical principles regarding simple faith, such as the faith of a mustard seed moving mountains, and encourages believers to expect significant and impossible developments in the years 2024 and 2025.
rawData: [March 21, 2024]-[God showed me how big He really is - He took me to creation]-[https://youtu.be/w9g4sxDYdqM]-[Hey, good morning family. I'm excited to be with you all again today. I have some things I want to talk to you about, but first of all, I just want to say thank you for all the likes, the subscribes, and the comments. It's a true blessing to us, and we just want to say thank you for supporting this YouTube channel as you have. God bless you all. I pray for you daily that the Lord increases you in every area of your life—physically, spiritually, financially, emotionally, everything—that the Lord will give you abundant overflow in your homes. I just want to say thank you from the bottom of our hearts for supporting this YouTube channel, and I appreciate your prayers for my family. I appreciate all your prayers. I'm going to do a video that I've already done before, but I felt because of the time that's passed since I made the video that I could do it better. I listened back to it and I thought, 'I think I can do better at that.' So, let's give it a shot. I've told you before how the Lord took me out of my body and I shot up into outer space. I could see the Lord, though from His midway up, I could not see anything during the whole visitation. I don't know if it was God the Father or Jesus, but I'm going to tell you, we were in outer space and I could see the planets. It was like everything was shrunk down. I know they're millions of miles apart, but everything in the solar system seemed so small to us. We were looking at it like the planets were right there. I could see Saturn, Jupiter, and Mars. I could see it all, but we were standing right next to the Sun the whole time. The Sun was massive, and it was over to my right. The Lord was also to the right, and I was looking out at the Sun when He spoke to me. He said, 'Brandon, how long does it take for the Sun's light to get to the Earth?' I knew the answer. I said, 'It takes like eight minutes and 20 some seconds.' Right then, I knew the answer, but now I've probably butchered it. I told the Lord that at 186,000 miles per second, the light travels from the Sun and takes 8 minutes and 27 seconds to get to the Earth. He asked me, 'Brandon, what is faster than the speed of light?' I said, 'I don't know, Lord.' He said, 'The speed of thought.' He said, 'Brandon, whenever you die and you come to be with Me, you will travel at the speed of thought, not at the speed of light.' The speed of thought is actually way faster than the speed of light because you are there instantly instead of traveling at 186,000 miles per second. He was telling me all this, and then He talked to me about how far the nearest star is, which is light-years away. I don't remember exactly how far it was, but He told me it would take thousands of years to get there even at 186,000 miles per second. Then He said, 'I want to take you and show you something.' All of a sudden, we were instantaneously there. This is where it gets good. What I could see before me when we went into this room was a massive white room. There was no beginning and no end to this room. The light in the room was so piercing, but there was no ceiling, no floor, nothing. It was like a dimension in itself. There before me was the universe. This is heavy, but I'm telling you all it's fact. The universe was in its own dimension. He created a room for the universe; all the galaxies were inside of another dimension that was endless. Before me, the universe was moving at the speed of light, being created. I could see inside of this massive area; it looked like cauliflower clouds—like thunderclouds moving very slowly—but it was forming right in front of my face. Stars were forming inside of this dimension, shrunk down. Though moving at 186,000 miles per second, it looked slow because He controls time. He is in control of all time; time does not exist around Him. At 186,000 miles per second, creating right before my eyes, it was moving so slowly. I could see how big it was since the beginning when He spoke it into existence, 'Let there be light.' All the things He said in Genesis were moving. It was the size of a Volkswagen Beetle—I don't know why, but that's the way it stood out to me. It was that shape and it was moving in all directions—downward, upward, left, right, north, south, east, west—all at the same time, creating from the center. It was like a thunderstorm, moving slowly like thunderclouds, all being formed and created inside of this room. Stars were moving and being created from every direction. It was all moving equally. He spoke to me and said, 'Brandon, you know in My Word where it says I can measure the span of the universe in My hand?' He said, 'I'm going to show you how I do it.' He took that universe and shrunk it down right before my eyes. He said, 'I create and I am able to manipulate it.' It was like clay before Him. He said, 'Brandon, it is in a dimension in itself,' and He could stretch it out or shrink it. He put it in His hand, and He had the whole universe—billions and billions of galaxies—shrunk down in this dimension. He said, 'Look, I can step into it.' He stretched it out and said, 'I can step into it or I can shrink it down, but Brandon, I measure it all in My hand.' He put it in His hand—it was stretched out and he showed it to me like a cube—and it was still growing. It never stopped; stars were still forming in His hand as He was holding it. No matter how He stretched it or shrank it, it was still being created. I just stood there and watched. I know I wasn't in my body; this was more than just a dream. This happened to me over 20 years ago and I've never forgotten it. I remember every detail like it was yesterday, other than the numbers. I've told you I've overcome my learning disabilities. He took me then and said, 'I want to show you something else,' and He showed me Heaven. Heaven was a massive planet, about the size of three Jupiters. Heaven is a massive planet, like a dimension in itself. I could see the gold; it was pure light. It was beyond comprehension; I cannot give it adequate justice with words. It was inside its own dimension. The universe was on the edge of Heaven. We were standing out there again, and I was looking at all the walls. There are massive walls all around Heaven, and I could see buildings—all kinds of houses and buildings. It's like a major city, but beautiful beyond words. I could see the walls formed with gold and all kinds of beautiful stones. Then all of a sudden I looked up, and the sky above me was filled with beautiful pinks, purples, and whites, swirled like a paisley print. He said, 'Brandon, this is My portion; I set this aside for Myself, Heaven. But son, I'm giving you the universe. All the galaxies are going to be yours.' He said that is the portion He is giving to His kids, the born-again believers. When you come home to be with Me after the thousand-year reign, you will spend eternity traveling at the speed of thought throughout all the galaxies and universes, going from one to another. There are planets and stars being made, and you will rule and reign forever and ever with Me over eternity in those places. Why people say, 'Why would I want my own galaxy?' I don't know. We have a mansion in Heaven, but I'm trying to tell you what I saw. Then He said to me, 'Do you see all that?' And I could see the stars being formed before me. That dimension was still being spread out, but He had opened it up and we were inside of it now. Heaven was on the edge of it, and the universe and all the galaxies were on this side. He told me, 'You will rule and reign with Me forever and ever.' You're never going to get bored. You'll travel at the speed of thought to all your brothers and sisters; the whole body of Christ is going to be ruling and reigning. He's creating a new Heaven and a new Earth. Folks, we have an amazing future. God has an amazing plan for His church and His people. It is not for us to be down and out. We're going to rule and reign with Him for all eternity. The Lord told me, 'Brandon, I am a big, big God. I want you to go back and tell My people they think way too small. I want them to start believing Me for bigger, for I am a big God able to do exceedingly abundantly above all they dare ask or think.' Remember that. He has it all in His hand. There are more stars than there are grains of sand on our beaches. You'll never be able to wrap your mind around how big the universe is. It's basically endless, but He's able to control it. It's still being created because life is still being created. People are getting born again every single day, and He has a place assigned just for you. One day, when we rule and reign with Him, whatever that purpose is, I have no idea. All I know is there's a big plan for us, and He loves you. I know that when we get there, He'll have a galaxy for you. The Milky Way is the galaxy we're in, but there are billions more. I hope I didn't butcher that, but I tried my best to explain something so amazing and life-changing. He wanted me to tell you how big He really is and that He's endless. Nothing is too hard for Him. All things are possible to him who believes. You just have to believe with simple faith. If you have the faith of a mustard seed, He said you would move a mountain. If you do not doubt in your heart, you'll have whatsoever things you say—Mark 11:24. I'm believing with all my heart for big things in 2024 and 2025. It's time to believe God for the impossible today. He's no respecter of persons, and what God did for one, He'll do for another. God loves you and He has an amazing plan. Beloved, I wish above all things that you prosper and be in health, even as your soul prospers. Think about that. He wants you to be in health; He wants you to be above and not beneath. He wants you to have a smile on your face and a song in your heart. We are the salt of the earth, ministering to our neighbors and telling them that Jesus loves them and is coming soon. Jesus is coming soon, folks. I hope you're ready. I hope your heart is prepared. A lot of people say, 'I don't believe in the Rapture.' That's your problem. I do, and He's coming back for you and me and those who believe and are seeking Him daily. Let me pray for you. Father, I thank You for 'big.' I thank You, God, for 'huge.' I thank You for 'ginormous'—that You are an awesome God able to do exceedingly abundantly above all that we'd ask or think. I thank You, God, that You're creating something amazing for me, my children, my wife, and all my friends and family. You have eternity; time is endless with You. You have everything in the span of Your hand. Father, I thank You that You come and visit me, that You have a plan for my life, and that You love me enough to show me secret things and things to come—for us to believe You for bigger, not smaller. We get out of our stinking thinking, poverty, and lack. Father, You're a God of more than enough. I've seen the edges of Heaven; there's no poverty in Heaven. There's only abundance, overflow of gold, rubies, sapphires, diamonds, pearls, and beautiful gemstones beyond comprehension. I thank You, Father, that You've created this for us and that You love us enough not to give us some shack down by the river, but to give us a mansion. You said You'd give us our heart's desires, God, and I thank You for that. You said, 'Beloved, I wish there would be on earth as it is in heaven.' I thank You, Father, that we don't have to struggle on this earth; we can have more than enough. Lord, we give You glory, honor, and praise. We call every single person watching this video healed, whole, and well, delivered from oppression. Strongholds are broken off their lives, set free by the blood of the Lamb and the word of their testimony. We thank You, Lord, that marriages are restored, homes are good, and children are blessed. Father, I thank You for a great year in 2024. By the time we get to the end of 2024, we will say, 'Look what the Lord has done.' Great is Your faithfulness to me. All my life You have been faithful and so, so good. Thank You, Father. I will sing and give You praise for Your goodness today. Thank You that we're healed and whole. I bless You, Lord. I just want to say thank you all for watching and supporting us. I hope this video blessed you and inspires you to believe for bigger. Jesus loves you so much and has great plans ahead for you. Put a smile on your face and a song in your heart. Jesus loves you so much, and we love you. We will see you next time. Have a blessed day. Bye-bye.]
